name: Marinara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Italian tomatoes, crushed (by your hands)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and onion; sauté until lightly browned (add garlic towards the end).
3. Stir in red wine, dried basil, oregano, tomato paste, water, and tomato puree.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Simmer for 2 hours, stirring often to prevent sticking.
